nx000000.name: Gran Liga ANK starts!
nx000000.desc: The tournament Gran Liga ANK starts, featuring some teams as ANK Team and ANK Mod.

nx000001.name: ANK Team wins the league!
nx000001.desc: ANK Team wins the tournament Gran Liga ANK, after beating Club Avere 4 - 1.

nxaf0ba8.name: Club de Fútbol ANK signs Lamine Yamal for 200 million euros!
nxaf0ba8.desc: Lamine Yamal has today happily signed for the team Club de Fútbol ANK, leaving former team ANK Mod, with a transaction of 200 million euros. Player says he sees a bright future here.

nx82a432.name: Club Avere signs Mohamed Salah for 25 million euros!
nx82a432.desc: Mohamed Salah has today happily signed for the team Club Avere, leaving former team Club Avere, with a transaction of 25 million euros. Player says he sees a bright future here.
